prompt.content: Take the average closing price for SPGI for the week of 4/21/2025 to 4/25/2025 (inclusive) and input that figure in the DCF model. Then, increase that average share price by the share price premium assigned to the corresponding week by using the data in the "Premium on Share Price.png." Calculate the updated weight of debt in the DCF model using this average share price with the premium added. State the share price used as the input for the DCF and the weighted debt percentage in the reply, with the values rounded to two decimal points.

rubrics.name: States average share price is $506.93 (acceptable range $501.86 to $512.00) (ver_d23fa3c9b102478f9fb88e77f2ac48c3)

messages.content: States average share price is $506.93 (acceptable range $501.86 to $512.00).
